commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the small live model matrix, teaches the live model harness to hydrate and register Ollama, updates focused tests, and documents the Ollama live-test endpoint override.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +411, Docs +1. Total +413 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR expands live-test coverage rather than reporting a reproducible product bug. The PR body provides post-change live smoke and Crabbox proof for the changed path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the live-test automation behavior, not a narrow repair job.

target.title: test(agents): include Ollama in small live model matrix
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the curated small live model matrix.
- Hydrate Ollama live-provider settings from `OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL`, existing config, or the local default endpoint.
- Register the real public Ollama live runtime for the live model suite without pulling extension internals into the core test TypeScript graph.
- Keep local/private Ollama endpoints from inheriting a cloud `OLLAMA_API_KEY` while still allowing hosted `https://ollama.com` auth.
- Document the Ollama small-model live-test default endpoint and override env.

Refs #86599.

## Verification
- `node scripts/check-tsgo-core-boundary.mjs && git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/help/testing-live.md && node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts --reporter=dot` (57 tests passed)
- `node scripts/test-live.mjs -- src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot` (29 tests passed/skipped through the live-suite setup path)
- `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small OPENCLAW_LIVE_PROVIDERS=ollama OPENCLAW_LIVE_MAX_MODELS=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODEL_CONCURRENCY=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODEL_TIMEOUT_MS=60000 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 OPENCLAW_LIVE_SETUP_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS_JSON_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_QUIET=0 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot --testNamePattern 'completes across selected models'` (1 passed, 28 skipped; selected `ollama/gemma3:4b` and exercised prompt, file-read, and image probes)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (`autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`, overall correct 0.82)
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_f8180a228b2f`, slug `violet-crab`, run `run_836c6f79f138`, instance `c7a.8xlarge`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `docs`, exit 0, lease stopped

## Rebase note
Rebased onto `origin/main` `b72853a742ba3fec1500c4b1c2d57794bca99d7e`, which includes the latest Codex/auth timer and expiry hardening. The fresh AWS Crabbox changed gate passed `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` on head `815cccbd23dbbe339b70f82978712beaf2b4ba91`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: the small live model matrix now includes a real Ollama local/small-model route, can discover/configure Ollama without manual model config, reaches the actual public Ollama runtime in live probes, and avoids leaking hosted Ollama credentials to local/private Ollama endpoints.
Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree; local live-suite setup path; hosted Ollama live smoke against `https://ollama.com`; AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: AWS Crabbox run `run_836c6f79f138` completed with exit 0 on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_f8180a228b2f`; local live Ollama smoke selected `ollama/gemma3:4b` and completed the prompt, file-read, and image probes.
Observed result after fix: changed lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` passed remotely; the targeted live-model path now reaches the real Ollama transport and the small-model selector includes Ollama.
What was not tested: hosted non-Ollama small providers for #87895; only Ollama credentials were available locally for this PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
